DISCOVERY, 302, MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING EVIDENCE SANCTION AGAINST PETITIONERS JULIE AND ROBERT CHAN, SUPPORTING DECLARATION OF ROSS MCLAURAN MADDEN, SEPARATE STATEMENT, AND SUPPORTING MEMORANDUM IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTION WAS SERVED ON SEPTEMBER 23, 2014 VIA E-MAIL. THIS MOTION REQUIRES 16-COURT DAYS NOTICE PLUS 2 ADDITIONAL CALENDAR DAYS FOR E-MAIL SERVICE. SEE CCP SECTION 1005(B). MOVING PARTY FAILED TO OBTAIN A COURT ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR SERVICE. FURTHERMORE, IF THE PRO TEM RULED ON THE MERITS OF THE MOTION IT WOULD BE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS IT SHOULD BE BROUGHT BEFORE THE TRIAL DEPARTMENT IN FORM OF A MOTION IN LIMINE OR AN OBJECTION WHEN THE EXPERTS ARE ABOUT TO TAKE THE STAND. COURT TO PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Evidence Sanction Against Petitioners Julie And Robert Chan, Supporting Declaration Of Ross Mclauran Madden, Separate Statement, And Supporting Memorandum
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ross McLauran Madden, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415. 567.1212, for respondent and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: RESPONDENT DARRYL CHAN Motion For Order Imposing Evidence Sanction Against Petitioners Julie And Robert Chan, Supporting Declaration Of Ross Mclauran Madden, Separate Statement, And Supporting Memorandum is Denied without prejudice. The motion was served on September 23, 2014 via e-mail. This motion requires 16-court days notice plus 2 additional calendar days for e-mail service. See CCP Section 1005(b). Moving party failed to obtain a court order shortening time for service. Furthermore, if the pro tem ruled on the merits of the motion it would be denied without prejudice as it should be brought before the trial department in form of a motion in limine or an objection when the experts are about to take the stand. Court to prepare the written order. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

MINI MINUTES:

RESPONDENT DARRYL CHAN Motion For Order Quashing Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Expenses Of The Motion, Declaration Of Ross Mclauran Madden, Memorandum Of Authorities is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Handley for Julie Chan and Robert Chan. Ross Madden for and with Darryl Chan (Respondent).

The Petition to Invalidate Trust Based on Lack of Capacity and Undue Influence, and Demand for Accounting was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court). If the Parties are interested in participating in mediation, they are to contact the Clerk so that the Court can issue an order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Handley for Julie Chan and Robert Chan (Petitioners). Ross Madden for and with Darryl Chan (Trustee).

Mr. Handley stated that discovery is coming along very well and that there are five more depositions left to be done in six to eight weeks. Mr. Madden explained that one of the Parties is difficult to get a hold of because he is out at sea on a ship. Mr. Handley stated that his Clients are amenable to mediation. Mr. Madden stated that his Client is not amenable to mediation. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Based on Lack of Capacity, etc. was continued to May 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a referral to Dept. 206 (Department of the Presiding Judge) for trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Ross Madden for and with Darryl Chan (Trustee/Respondent). Gerome Handley for Petitioners.

Mr. Madden reported on the status of the case that they half way through discovery. The matter was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Jan-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Handley for and with Robert Chan and for Julie Chan. Ross Madden for and with Darryl Chan (Trustee/Respondent).

Mr. Handley stated his Paralegal is dealing with the Substitution of Attorney, that it will be filed forthwith and that he would like to see if they could do mediation after the depositions. Mr. Madden stated that he has about 8 or 9 days of depositions and that he expects to be done by the end of January. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Based on Lack of Capacity and Undue Influence, etc. was continued to January 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery and a referral to mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Matthew Owens for Julie Chan. Ross Madden for and with Darrell Chan.

Mr. Madden stated that the 2000 Trust had been found, that the parties are completing discovery, that they would be taking some limited depositions over the next two to three months, and after that the matter would either settle or would be ready for trial setting. The matter was continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity And Undue Influence, And Demand For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Owens for and with Julie Chan and Robert Chan (Petitioners). Ross Madden for and with Darryl Chan (Respondent). Dennis Chan also present.

The Court asked if someone could file the June 13, 2000 Trust. Mr. Madden stated that they will file it if they can find it. Mr. owens stated that he has never seen the 2000 Trust and that they are trying figure out what the differences are between the Trusts. Darryl Chan stated that the Trust value is $4,400,000.00 and there is no property outside of the Trust. Mr. Madden stated that they were not interested in mediation but that they would like to do discovery. Mr. Owens stated that they are willing to entertain mediation down the road. The Court encouraged the Parties to exchange information, to provide a list of the information they are requesting, and to try and cooperate with each other. Julie Chan clarified that David's date of death is March 6, 1995. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Based on Lack of Capacity, etc. was continued to July 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
